feature: Fix meal-plan-config.tsx — complete hardcoded color replacement, single pass

prompts.description: Replace all 6 hardcoded color classes in meal-plan-config.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/meal-plan-config.tsx, make exactly these find-and-replace changes. There are NO inline style={{ }} attributes in this file — all fixes are className replacements only.

1. Daily Target card outer div (line ~106):
   Find:    `rounded-[22px] border border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] p-4`
   Replace: `rounded-[22px] border border-border bg-card p-4`
   Reason: bg-[#f8f2ea] is the cream background causing dark mode failure. bg-card renders correctly in both modes. The large calorie number on line ~112 already uses text-foreground — once the bg is bg-card, it will be readable.

2. "Daily target" label (line ~109):
   Find:    `text-[#7a5b41]`
   Replace: `text-muted-foreground`

3. Hero badge (line ~95):
   Find:    `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   Replace: `hero-badge bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`

4. Accent dot (line ~152):
   Find:    `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]`
   Replace: `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground`

5. Meal rhythm card — selected state (line ~173):
   Find:    `border-primary bg-[#edf4ec] shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`
   Replace: `border-primary bg-primary/15 shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`

6. Meal rhythm card — idle hover (line ~174):
   Find:    `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]`
   Replace: `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-secondary`

Do not add any inline style attributes. Do not change the calorie number className (already text-foreground on line ~112) or the meal count number (already text-foreground on line ~177). Do not touch any other files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
